case_title: LIBERTY MUTUAL FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DOE DRIVER et al

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIBERTY MUTUAL FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MCDEVITT, PATRICK MILES DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-07-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-21-2002
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE DRIVER TO BE MCDEVITT, PATRICK MILES

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
